raw_title: Journalists’ Perception of Artificial Intelligence: The Case of Nigerian Newsrooms
title_en: Journalists’ Perception of Artificial Intelligence: The Case of Nigerian Newsrooms
title_zh: 记者对人工智能的认知：以尼日利亚新闻编辑室为例
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了尼日利亚新闻编辑室中记者对人工智能的看法。它可能调查记者如何理解人工智能技术，以及他们是否愿意在工作中采用这些技术。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how journalists in Nigerian newsrooms perceive artificial intelligence. It likely investigates their understanding of AI technologies and their willingness to adopt them in their work.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注人工智能在新闻业中的社会接受度和应用障碍，特别是在发展中国家如尼日利亚的背景下。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the social acceptance and barriers to AI adoption in journalism, particularly in developing contexts like Nigeria.
